since_last: 50% of 86 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +2.04%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 50% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.88% · BTC -2.24% · Gold -0.64% · Nasdaq100 -2.48%. 50% of 86 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +2.04%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +2.04%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -5.93%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at -10.21%
cards.body: Leaders: NET +5.28%, SPCX +5.17%, IBM +5.15%, NOW +4.59%, MGNI +4.21%. Laggards: MU -10.21%, VRT -8.95%, ARM -8.93%, LRCX -8.80%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +5.17% at $162.59
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +5.17% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
